notes: process_violation: feature_list_produced — the response is structured primarily as a solution specification (functional requirements, workflow steps, Azure AI Speech + LLM feature description) rather than a problem-framed discovery artefact; D1 is borderline but the dominant framing throughout is 'here is what to build' rather than 'here is the gap and its cost'; MVP is not bounded with explicit deferrals (no pilot scope vs full rollout delineation, no explicit capability deferred); out-of-scope section is absent as a named section; personas are generic role labels without cost/timing context; success indicators reference the 340 incidents baseline but provide no target or pilot gate criterion.
